title: Where to get the Robot Damashii Evangelions
display_title: Where to get the Robot Damashii Evangelions
wikitext:
[]: Where to get the Robot Damashii Evangelions?             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Fri Feb 15, 2013 6:56 pm Hi! After seeing the new upcoming S.H Monsterarts Angels and learning that they are to scale with the Robot Damashii Evangelions, and with the only way I have found so far of getting the Soul of Chogokin SPEC Evangelions being a source from eBay selling them all for almost £1000, I have decided that it may be a better idea to focus on getting the Robot Damashii figures instead. However, I really don't know where to look. Can anyone help me find them for a reasonable price? If it helps, I'm mainly after Unit 01 (Rebuild or Original, I don't mind) Unit 02 (once again, don't mind which version) and Unit 00 (Original, the Rebuild version is crazy expensive and I don't like it as much as the original), although I would like to know which ones are available. Also, if there is no way of getting them for a reasonable price, what is the best alternative at the same sort of scale? Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by jpopxfile » Sun Feb 17, 2013 7:35 am Pmed you regarding this. I live in Tokyo and I'm able to help you out with this.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Sun Feb 17, 2013 8:07 am Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by shaneva002 » Mon Feb 18, 2013 6:48 pm Mandarake Is the best option for Robot Damashii Evas, just gotta keep looking there daily since the get stuff in all the time.

Article: Where to get the Robot Damashii Evangelions
[]: Where to get the Robot Damashii Evangelions?             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Fri Feb 15, 2013 6:56 pm Hi! After seeing the new upcoming S.H Monsterarts Angels and learning that they are to scale with the Robot Damashii Evangelions, and with the only way I have found so far of getting the Soul of Chogokin SPEC Evangelions being a source from eBay selling them all for almost £1000, I have decided that it may be a better idea to focus on getting the Robot Damashii figures instead. However, I really don't know where to look. Can anyone help me find them for a reasonable price? If it helps, I'm mainly after Unit 01 (Rebuild or Original, I don't mind) Unit 02 (once again, don't mind which version) and Unit 00 (Original, the Rebuild version is crazy expensive and I don't like it as much as the original), although I would like to know which ones are available. Also, if there is no way of getting them for a reasonable price, what is the best alternative at the same sort of scale? Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by jpopxfile » Sun Feb 17, 2013 7:35 am Pmed you regarding this. I live in Tokyo and I'm able to help you out with this.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Sun Feb 17, 2013 8:07 am Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by shaneva002 » Mon Feb 18, 2013 6:48 pm Mandarake Is the best option for Robot Damashii Evas, just gotta keep looking there daily since the get stuff in all the time.
